name: Acp
notes: Asymmetric Capital Partners, pre-seed/seed VC, headquartered at 11 Arlington St, Boston, MA 02116.

name: 186ventures
notes: Pre-seed & seed stage VC firm, 131 Dartmouth St., 3rd Floor, Boston, MA 02116.

name: Fieldvc
notes: Field Ventures, early-stage VC firm based in New York, NY.

name: The98
notes: The 98, early-stage VC focused on women-led tech companies, founded 2022 by Lynda Clarizio and Joy Marcus, based in New York, NY.

name: Rebalancecap
notes: Rebalance Capital, venture capital firm headquartered in New York City, NY.

name: Visiblehands
notes: Visible Hands, VC firm supporting underrepresented founders, 25 Dorchester Ave Unit 52002, Boston, MA 02205.

name: Bain
notes: Bain & Company, global management consulting firm founded 1973, HQ at 350 Boylston Street, Boston, MA. Industry labeled SaaS is not ideal; best fit from vocabulary is SaaS but Bain is a consulting firm — no closer vocabulary label available.

name: Cherryrock Capital
notes: Cherryrock Capital, venture capital firm at 2370 Market Street Suite 103-134, San Francisco, CA 94114.

name: Collidecap
notes: Collide Capital, early-stage VC focused on fintech, supply chain, and future of work. HQ: 228 Park Ave South, Suite 70356, New York, NY 10003. Also has SF office.

name: Ansa
notes: Ansa (ansa.co / ansa.dev), modern stored value wallet platform for merchants, founded 2022, headquartered at 3130 20th Street, San Francisco, CA.

name: Howie
notes: Howie, AI-powered email scheduling assistant, raised $6M seed in 2025. GeekWire identifies it as a Seattle startup in Fremont neighborhood; some sources say San Francisco. GeekWire considered most authoritative for Seattle-based companies.

name: Settle
notes: Settle, cash flow and inventory management platform for CPG brands, founded 2019/2020. Actual canonical domain appears to be settle.com but input has settle.co — preserving existing non-null values as required. HQ: San Francisco, CA.
